tZh: Pixtral 12B：120亿参数多模态语言模型
sEn: Pixtral-12B is a 12B multimodal model that excels in both vision and text tasks, outperforming larger models.
sZh: Pixtral-12B是一款120亿参数的多模态语言模型，在视觉和文本任务上均表现出色，超越了更大的模型。
absEn: We introduce Pixtral-12B, a 12--billion-parameter multimodal language model. Pixtral-12B is trained to understand both natural images and documents, achieving leading performance on various multimodal benchmarks, surpassing a number of larger models. Unlike many open-source models, Pixtral is also a cutting-edge text model for its size, and does not compromise on natural language performance to excel in multimodal tasks. Pixtral uses a new vision encoder trained from scratch, which allows it to ingest images at their natural resolution and aspect ratio. This gives users flexibility on the number of tokens used to process an image. Pixtral is also able to process any number of images in its long context window of 128K tokens. Pixtral 12B substanially outperforms other open models of similar sizes (Llama-3.2 11B \& Qwen-2-VL 7B). It also outperforms much larger open models like Llama-3.2 90B while being 7x smaller. We further contribute an open-source benchmark, MM-MT-Bench, for evaluating vision-language models in practical scenarios, and provide detailed analysis and code for standardized evaluation protocols for multimodal LLMs. Pixtral-12B is released under Apache 2.0 license.
absZh: 我们推出了Pixtral-12B，一个120亿参数的多模态语言模型。Pixtral-12B经过训练，能够理解自然图像和文档，在各种多模态基准测试中取得了领先性能，超越了许多更大的模型。与许多开源模型不同，Pixtral在其规模上也是一款尖端的文本模型，并且不会为了在多模态任务中表现出色而牺牲自然语言性能。Pixtral使用了一个从头开始训练的新视觉编码器，使其能够以自然分辨率和宽高比处理图像。这为用户在处理图像时使用的令牌数量提供了灵活性。Pixtral还能够在128K令牌的长上下文窗口中处理任意数量的图像。Pixtral 12B显著优于其他类似规模的开源模型（Llama-3.2 11B和Qwen-2-VL 7B）。它还优于更大的开源模型，如Llama-3.2 90B，同时体积小7倍。我们进一步贡献了一个开源基准测试MM-MT-Bench，用于评估实际场景中的视觉语言模型，并为多模态LLM的标准化评估协议提供了详细分析和代码。Pixtral-12B在Apache 2.0许可下发布。

contrib.en: Introduces Pixtral-12B, a 12B-parameter multimodal model with a novel vision encoder supporting native resolution and aspect ratio.
contrib.zh: 提出Pixtral-12B，一个120亿参数的多模态模型，采用新型视觉编码器，支持原生分辨率和宽高比。

contrib.en: Achieves leading performance on multimodal benchmarks, surpassing larger open and closed models like Llama-3.2 90B and Claude-3 Haiku.
contrib.zh: 在多模态基准上取得领先性能，超越Llama-3.2 90B和Claude-3 Haiku等更大模型。

contrib.en: Maintains strong text-only performance without sacrificing multimodal capabilities, serving as a drop-in replacement for both tasks.
contrib.zh: 保持强大的纯文本性能而不牺牲多模态能力，可作为两种任务的直接替代。

contrib.en: Open-sources MM-MT-Bench, a practical multimodal benchmark with multi-turn conversations, correlating highly with LMSys Vision ELO.
contrib.zh: 开源MM-MT-Bench，一个实用的多模态基准，包含多轮对话，与LMSys Vision ELO高度相关。

contrib.en: Provides standardized evaluation protocols with explicit prompts and flexible parsing, addressing inconsistencies in current benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 提供标准化评估协议，包括显式提示和灵活解析，解决当前基准的不一致性。

contrib.en: Releases model under Apache 2.0 license, including inference and evaluation code for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 在Apache 2.0许可下发布模型，包括推理和评估代码，确保可复现性。

limits.en: Evaluation relies on LLM judges for MM-MT-Bench, which may introduce bias or inconsistency.
limits.zh: MM-MT-Bench评估依赖LLM裁判，可能引入偏差或不一致性。

limits.en: Vision encoder ablation only compares with CLIPA, not other modern encoders like SigLIP.
limits.zh: 视觉编码器消融仅与CLIPA比较，未涉及SigLIP等其他现代编码器。

limits.en: Performance on some benchmarks may vary with prompt design, as shown by sensitivity to explicit vs naive prompts.
limits.zh: 在某些基准上的性能可能因提示设计而异，如显式与朴素提示的敏感性所示。

limits.en: Model size (12B) may limit deployment on resource-constrained devices compared to smaller models.
limits.zh: 模型大小（12B）可能限制在资源受限设备上的部署，相较于更小模型。

limits.en: MM-MT-Bench covers only five image categories, potentially missing other practical domains.
limits.zh: MM-MT-Bench仅覆盖五类图像，可能遗漏其他实际领域。

items.en: We introduce Pixtral 12B, a 12–billion-parameter multimodal language model. Pixtral 12B is trained to understand both natural images and documents, achieving leading performance on various multimodal benchmarks, surpassing a number of larger models. Unlike many open-source models, Pixtral is also a cutting-edge text model for its size, and does not compromise on natural language performance to excel in multimodal tasks. Pixtral uses a new vision encoder trained from scratch, which allows it to ingest images at their natural resolution and aspect ratio. This gives users flexibility on the number of tokens used to process an image. Pixtral is also able to process any number of images in its long context window of 128K tokens. Pixtral 12B substanially outperforms other open models of similar sizes (Llama-3.2 11B & Qwen-2-VL 7B). It also outperforms much larger open models like Llama-3.2 90B while being 7x smaller. We further contribute an open-source benchmark, MM-MT-Bench, for evaluating vision-language models in practical scenarios, and provide detailed analysis and code for standardized evaluation protocols for multimodal LLMs. Pixtral 12B is released under Apache 2.0 license.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 Pixtral 12B，一个 120 亿参数的多模态语言模型。Pixtral 12B 经过训练，能够理解自然图像和文档，在各种多模态基准测试中取得了领先性能，超越了许多更大的模型。与许多开源模型不同，Pixtral 在其规模下也是一款前沿的文本模型，并且在多模态任务中表现出色的同时，不会牺牲自然语言性能。Pixtral 使用了一个从头开始训练的新视觉编码器，使其能够以图像的自然分辨率和宽高比处理图像。这为用户在处理图像时使用的 token 数量提供了灵活性。Pixtral 还能够在 128K token 的长上下文窗口中处理任意数量的图像。Pixtral 12B 显著优于其他类似规模的开源模型（Llama-3.2 11B 和 Qwen-2-VL 7B）。它还优于像 Llama-3.2 90B 这样大得多的开源模型，同时体积小 7 倍。我们进一步贡献了一个开源基准测试 MM-MT-Bench，用于评估实际场景中的视觉语言模型，并为多模态大语言模型的标准化评估协议提供了详细分析和代码。Pixtral 12B 在 Apache 2.0 许可下发布。

items.en: Webpage: https://mistral.ai/news/pixtral-12b/ Inference code: https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-inference/ Evaluation code: https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-evals/
items.zh: 网页：https://mistral.ai/news/pixtral-12b/ 推理代码：https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-inference/ 评估代码：https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-evals/

items.capEn: Figure 1: Pixtral Performance. Pixtral outperforms all open-models within its weight class on multimodal tasks by a substantial margin. Left: Performance on MM-MT-Bench, a new multimodal, multiturn, instruction following benchmark designed to reflect real world usage of multimodal language models. Right: Performance on the public LMSys leaderboard (Vision arena, October 2024).
items.capZh: 图 1：Pixtral 性能。Pixtral 在多模态任务上以显著优势超越了其权重级别内的所有开源模型。左图：在 MM-MT-Bench 上的性能，这是一个新的多模态、多轮、指令跟随基准测试，旨在反映多模态语言模型的实际使用情况。右图：在公开 LMSys 排行榜（Vision arena，2024 年 10 月）上的性能。

items.en: This paper describes Pixtral 12B, a multimodal language model trained to understand both images and text, released with open weights under an Apache 2.0 license. Pixtral is an instruction tuned model which is pretrained on large scale interleaved image and text documents, and hence is capable of multi-turn, multi-image conversation.
items.zh: 本文描述了 Pixtral 12B，一个经过训练能够理解图像和文本的多模态语言模型，以 Apache 2.0 许可开源发布权重。Pixtral 是一个指令微调模型，在大规模交错图像和文本文档上进行了预训练，因此能够进行多轮、多图像对话。

items.en: Pixtral comes with a new vision encoder which is trained with a novel RoPE-2D implementation, allowing it to process images at their native resolution and aspect ratio. In this way, the model can flexibly process images at low resolution in latency-constrained settings, while processing images at high resolution when fine-grained reasoning is required.
items.zh: Pixtral 配备了一个新的视觉编码器，该编码器采用新颖的 RoPE-2D 实现进行训练，使其能够以图像的原生分辨率和宽高比处理图像。这样，模型可以在延迟受限的设置中灵活地以低分辨率处理图像，而在需要细粒度推理时以高分辨率处理图像。

items.en: When compared against models of a similar size in the same evaluation setting, we find that Pixtral delivers strong multimodal reasoning capabilities without sacrificing text-only reasoning performance. For instance, our model matches or exceeds the performance of models like Qwen2-VL 7B [23] and Llama-3.2 11B [6] on popular multimodal benchmarks like MMMU [24] and MathVista [14], while outperforming most open-source models on popular text-only tasks like MATH [7] and HumanEval [26]. Pixtral even outperforms much larger models like Llama-3.2 90B [6], as well as closed models such as Claude-3 Haiku [1] and Gemini-1.5 Flash 8B [18], on multimodal benchmarks.
items.zh: 与相同评估设置下类似规模的模型相比，我们发现 Pixtral 在不牺牲纯文本推理性能的情况下，提供了强大的多模态推理能力。例如，我们的模型在流行的多模态基准测试（如 MMMU [24] 和 MathVista [14]）上匹配或超过了 Qwen2-VL 7B [23] 和 Llama-3.2 11B [6] 等模型的性能，同时在流行的纯文本任务（如 MATH [7] 和 HumanEval [26]）上优于大多数开源模型。Pixtral 甚至优于像 Llama-3.2 90B [6] 这样大得多的模型，以及像 Claude-3 Haiku [1] 和 Gemini-1.5 Flash 8B [18] 这样的闭源模型。

items.en: During evaluation of Pixtral and the baselines, we found that evaluation protocols for multimodal language models is not standardized, and that small changes in the setup can dramatically change the performance of some models. We provide thorough analysis of our experience in re-evaluating vision-language models under a common evaluation protocol.
items.zh: 在评估 Pixtral 和基线模型时，我们发现多模态语言模型的评估协议尚未标准化，设置中的微小变化可能会显著改变某些模型的性能。我们提供了在统一评估协议下重新评估视觉语言模型的经验的详尽分析。

items.en: Specifically, we identify two issues with evaluation:
items.zh: 具体来说，我们发现了评估中的两个问题：

items.en: • Prompts: Several benchmarks have default prompts which are under-specified, and dramatically reduce the performance of leading closed source models [16, 1] compared to reported figures.
items.zh: • 提示：一些基准测试的默认提示不够明确，与报告的数字相比，显著降低了领先闭源模型 [16, 1] 的性能。

items.en: • Evaluation Metrics: The official metrics typically require exact match, which score model generations as correct only if they exactly match the reference answer. However, this metric penalizes answers which are substantively correct but in a slightly different format (e.g., "6.0" vs "6").
items.zh: • 评估指标：官方指标通常要求精确匹配，即只有当模型生成的答案与参考答案完全匹配时才计为正确。然而，该指标会惩罚那些实质正确但格式略有不同的答案（例如，“6.0”与“6”）。

items.en: To alleviate these issues, we propose ‘Explicit’ prompts that explicitly specify the format required by the reference answer. We further analyze the impact of flexible parsing for various models, releasing the evaluation code and prompts in an effort to establish fair and standardized evaluation protocols111https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-evals/.
items.zh: 为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了“显式”提示，明确指定参考答案所需的格式。我们进一步分析了灵活解析对各种模型的影响，并发布了评估代码和提示，以建立公平和标准化的评估协议111https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-evals/。

items.en: Moreover, while current multimodal benchmarks mostly evaluate short-form or multiple-choice question answering given an input image, they do not fully capture a model’s utility for practical use cases (e.g. in a multi-turn, long-form assistant setting). To address this, we open-source a novel multimodal, multi-turn evaluation: MM-MT-Bench222https://huggingface.co/datasets/mistralai/MM-MT-Bench. We find that performance on MM-MT-Bench correlates highly with ELO rankings on the LMSys Vision Leaderboard.
items.zh: 此外，虽然当前的多模态基准测试主要评估给定输入图像后的短形式或多项选择问答，但它们并未完全捕捉模型在实际用例中的效用（例如，在多轮、长形式助手设置中）。为了解决这个问题，我们开源了一个新颖的多模态、多轮评估：MM-MT-Bench222https://huggingface.co/datasets/mistralai/MM-MT-Bench。我们发现 MM-MT-Bench 上的性能与 LMSys Vision Leaderboard 上的 ELO 排名高度相关。

items.en: Pixtral excels at multimodal instruction following, surpassing comparable open-source models on the MM-MT-Bench benchmark (see Figure 1). Based on human preferences on the LMSys Vision Leaderboard, Pixtral 12B is currently the highest ranked Apache 2.0 model, substantially outperforming other open-models such Llama-3.2 11B [6] and Qwen2-VL 7B [23]. It even ranks higher than several closed models such as Claude-3 Opus & Claude-3 Sonnet [1], and several larger models such as Llama-3.2 90B [6].
items.zh: Pixtral 在多模态指令跟随方面表现出色，在 MM-MT-Bench 基准测试上超越了可比的开源模型（见图 1）。基于 LMSys Vision Leaderboard 上的人类偏好，Pixtral 12B 目前是排名最高的 Apache 2.0 模型，显著优于其他开源模型，如 Llama-3.2 11B [6] 和 Qwen2-VL 7B [23]。它甚至排名高于几个闭源模型，如 Claude-3 Opus 和 Claude-3 Sonnet [1]，以及几个更大的模型，如 Llama-3.2 90B [6]。

items.en: Pixtral 12B is based on the transformer architecture [22], and consists of a multimodal decoder to perform high-level reasoning, and a vision encoder to allow the model to ingest images. The main parameters of the model are summarized in Table 1.
items.zh: Pixtral 12B 基于 Transformer 架构 [22]，由一个多模态解码器（用于执行高级推理）和一个视觉编码器（使模型能够摄入图像）组成。模型的主要参数总结在表 1 中。

items.en: Pixtral 12B is built on top of Mistral Nemo 12B [15], a 12-billion parameter decoder-only language model that achieves strong performance across a range of knowledge and reasoning tasks.
items.zh: Pixtral 12B 建立在 Mistral Nemo 12B [15] 之上，这是一个 120 亿参数的纯解码器语言模型，在一系列知识和推理任务上取得了强劲性能。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Pixtral Vision Encoder. Pixtral uses a new vision encoder, which is trained from scratch to natively support variable image sizes and aspect ratios. Block-diagonal attention masks enable sequence packing for batching, while RoPE-2D encodings facilitate variable image sizes. Note that the attention mask and position encodings are fed to the vision transformer as additional input, and utilized only in the self-attention layers.
items.capZh: 图 2：Pixtral 视觉编码器。Pixtral 使用了一个新的视觉编码器，该编码器从头开始训练，原生支持可变图像尺寸和宽高比。块对角注意力掩码实现了批处理的序列打包，而 RoPE-2D 编码则促进了可变图像尺寸。注意，注意力掩码和位置编码作为额外输入馈送到视觉 Transformer 中，并仅在自注意力层中使用。

items.en: In order for Pixtral 12B to ingest images, we train a new vision encoder from scratch, named Pixtral-ViT. Here, our goal is to instantiate a simple architecture which is capable of processing images across a wide range of resolutions and aspect ratios. To do this, we build a 400 million parameter vision transformer [5] (see Table 1) and make four key changes over the standard architectures [17]:
items.zh: 为了使 Pixtral 12B 能够摄入图像，我们从头开始训练了一个新的视觉编码器，命名为 Pixtral-ViT。我们的目标是实例化一个简单的架构，能够处理各种分辨率和宽高比的图像。为此，我们构建了一个 4 亿参数的视觉 Transformer [5]（见表 1），并对标准架构 [17] 进行了四个关键更改：

items.en: Break tokens: In order to assist the model in distinguishing between images with the same number of patches (same area) but different aspect ratios, we include [IMAGE BREAK] tokens between image rows [2]. We further include an [IMAGE END] token at the end of an image sequence.
items.zh: 分隔 token：为了帮助模型区分具有相同补丁数量（相同面积）但不同宽高比的图像，我们在图像行之间包含了 [IMAGE BREAK] token [2]。我们还在图像序列的末尾包含了一个 [IMAGE END] token。

items.en: Gating in FFN: Instead of standard feedforward layer in the attention block, we use gating in the hidden layer [19].
items.zh: FFN 中的门控：我们没有使用注意力块中的标准前馈层，而是在隐藏层中使用了门控 [19]。

items.en: Sequence packing: In order to efficiently process images within a single batch, we flatten the images along the sequence dimension and concatenate them [3]. We construct a block-diagonal mask to ensure no attention leakage between patches from different images.
items.zh: 序列打包：为了在单个批次中高效处理图像，我们沿序列维度展平图像并将它们连接起来 [3]。我们构建了一个块对角掩码，以确保不同图像的补丁之间没有注意力泄漏。

items.en: RoPE-2D: We replace traditional learned and absolute position embeddings for image patches with relative, rotary position encodings [11, 20] in the self-attention layers. While learned position embeddings must be interpolated to deal with new image sizes (often at the cost of performance), relative position encodings lend themselves naturally to variable image sizes.
items.zh: RoPE-2D：我们在自注意力层中，用相对旋转位置编码 [11, 20] 替换了图像块的传统学习式绝对位置嵌入。虽然学习式位置嵌入必须通过插值来处理新的图像尺寸（通常以性能为代价），但相对位置编码自然适用于可变图像尺寸。

items.en: Particularly, let x𝑥x be a d𝑑d-dimensional patch vector (either a key or query feature). We denote this feature as x(i,j)superscript𝑥𝑖𝑗x^{(i,j)} when it appears at position (i,j)𝑖𝑗(i,j) in the image. Then, the RoPE-2D transform of x(i,j)superscript𝑥𝑖𝑗x^{(i,j)} is expressed as:
items.zh: 特别地，令 x 为 d 维图像块向量（键或查询特征）。当该特征出现在图像中的位置 (i,j) 时，我们将其记为 x^(i,j)。那么，x^(i,j) 的 RoPE-2D 变换表示为：

items.en: Here, sub-matrices MΘ(i,j)[k:k+2,k:k+2]M^{(i,j)}_{\Theta}[k:k+2,k:k+2] capture the height position of the feature (i𝑖i) for odd values of dimension k𝑘k, and capture the width position (j𝑗j) for even values of k𝑘k (1-based indexing). Furthermore, Θ=[θ1​…​θd/2]Θdelimited-[]subscript𝜃1…subscript𝜃𝑑2\Theta=[\theta_{1}\dots\theta_{d/2}] is a vector of frequencies for the various dimensions of x𝑥x, where θmsubscript𝜃𝑚\theta_{m} is defined following standard practice for RoPE-1D [20].
items.zh: 这里，子矩阵 M_Θ^(i,j)[k:k+2, k:k+2] 在维度 k 为奇数时捕获特征的高度位置 (i)，在 k 为偶数时捕获宽度位置 (j)（基于 1 的索引）。此外，Θ=[θ_1 … θ_(d/2)] 是 x 各维度的频率向量，其中 θ_m 按照 RoPE-1D [20] 的标准实践定义。

items.en: Critically, our simple implementation of the RoPE-2D transform satisfies the “relative” property: that inner products between two vectors are dependent only on their relative difference in height and width position, rather than their absolute position (see more details in Appendix B).
items.zh: 关键的是，我们 RoPE-2D 变换的简单实现满足“相对”性质：两个向量之间的内积仅取决于它们在高度和宽度位置上的相对差异，而非绝对位置（更多细节见附录 B）。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Complete Pixtral Architecture. Pixtral has two components: a vision encoder, which tokenizes images, and a multimodal decoder, which predicts the next text token given a sequence of text and images. Pixtral can take an arbitrary number of images as input, provided they fit within its 128K context window.
items.capZh: 图 3：完整的 Pixtral 架构。Pixtral 有两个组件：一个视觉编码器，用于将图像分词；一个多模态解码器，用于在给定文本和图像序列后预测下一个文本词元。Pixtral 可以接受任意数量的图像作为输入，只要它们适合其 128K 上下文窗口。

items.en: Discussion: Our vision encoder is specifically designed for multimodal modeling. Traditional encoders are typically optimized for ImageNet performance at a resolution of, for example, 224×224224224224\times 224 or 336×336336336336\times 336 pixels. When incorporated into multimodal language models – which flexibly perform tasks from standard classification to optical character recognition – prior works typically break an image into smaller (square) tiles before independently feeding tiles to the vision encoder. Instead, our vision encoder can naturally adapt to both high and low resolution images at their native aspect ratio, providing substantially improved performance for multi-modal tasks (see Section 4.4).
items.zh: 讨论：我们的视觉编码器专门为多模态建模设计。传统编码器通常针对 ImageNet 性能进行优化，分辨率例如 224×224 或 336×336 像素。当集成到多模态语言模型中时——这些模型灵活地执行从标准分类到光学字符识别的任务——先前的工作通常将图像分割成较小的（方形）图块，然后独立地将图块馈送到视觉编码器。相反，我们的视觉编码器可以自然地适应高分辨率和低分辨率图像，并保持其原始宽高比，从而为多模态任务提供显著改进的性能（见第 4.4 节）。

items.en: The Pixtral vision encoder is linked to the multimodal decoder via a two-layer fully connected network. This network transforms the output of the vision encoder into the input embedding size required by the decoder via an intermediate hidden layer of the same size, employing the GeLU activation [8]. The image tokens are treated identically to the text tokens by the multimodal decoder, including RoPE-1D [20] positional encodings for all tokens. Particularly, our decoder uses a causal self-attention mechanism, smoothly facilitating capabilities such as multi-image conversations. The architecture is illustrated in Figure 3.
items.zh: Pixtral 视觉编码器通过一个两层全连接网络连接到多模态解码器。该网络通过一个相同大小的中间隐藏层，使用 GeLU 激活 [8]，将视觉编码器的输出转换为解码器所需的输入嵌入大小。图像词元被多模态解码器视为与文本词元相同，包括所有词元的 RoPE-1D [20] 位置编码。特别地，我们的解码器使用因果自注意力机制，平滑地促进多图像对话等功能。架构如图 3 所示。

full.sec: 3 MM-MT-Bench: A benchmark for multi-modal instruction following

items.en: Most existing multimodal benchmarks measure the ability of a model to perform some form of multiple-choice question answering given an input image. While this is a useful signal for the model’s ability to understand the image, it does not capture the extent of the model’s utility to a user (for instance as a multimodal assistant or chatbot). In order to measure this quality, instruction-tuned text-only models are typically evaluated on MT-Bench [25], wherein an independent LLM judge grades a model’s output with respect to a reference answer. We construct and release a new benchmark named Multimodal MT-Bench (MM-MT-Bench) in a similar vein to the text-only variant, to evaluate the performance of instruction-tuned multimodal models.
items.zh: 大多数现有的多模态基准测试衡量模型在给定输入图像的情况下执行某种形式的多项选择题问答的能力。虽然这是模型理解图像能力的有用信号，但它并未捕捉模型对用户（例如作为多模态助手或聊天机器人）的实用程度。为了衡量这一质量，经过指令调优的纯文本模型通常在 MT-Bench [25] 上进行评估，其中独立的 LLM 评判员根据参考答案对模型的输出进行评分。我们构建并发布了一个名为 Multimodal MT-Bench (MM-MT-Bench) 的新基准测试，类似于纯文本版本，以评估经过指令调优的多模态模型的性能。

items.en: Design. MM-MT-Bench contains 92 conversations in total. It covers a breadth of practical use cases, covering five categories of images: charts (21), tables (19), PDF pages (24) diagrams (20) and miscellaneous (8). There are 69 single-turn conversations, 18 conversations with 2 turns, 4 of them with 3 turns and 1 conversation with 4 turns. To evaluate a model, we query the model in parallel over all turns of a conversation, providing reference answers for the past turns as history. Each turn is rated independently by the judge with the entire conversation history provided. The judge is prompted to rate the conversation on a scale of 1 to 10 based on correctness (i.e. was the extracted information correct) and completeness (i.e. does the model answer cover all the points raised in the reference). The evaluation process is illustrated in Figure 4. The judge prompt is provided in Appendix A.5. The results shown in Table 2 show that MM-MT-Bench has a 0.91 Pearson Correlation Coefficient with LMSys-Vision ELO ratings.
items.zh: 设计。MM-MT-Bench 总共包含 92 个对话。它涵盖了广泛的实用场景，包括五类图像：图表（21 个）、表格（19 个）、PDF 页面（24 个）、图表（20 个）和其他（8 个）。其中有 69 个单轮对话、18 个两轮对话、4 个三轮对话和 1 个四轮对话。为了评估模型，我们并行查询模型的所有对话轮次，提供过去轮次的参考答案作为历史。每个轮次由评判员根据整个对话历史独立评分。评判员被提示根据正确性（即提取的信息是否正确）和完整性（即模型答案是否涵盖参考答案中提出的所有要点）对对话进行 1 到 10 的评分。评估过程如图 4 所示。评判提示见附录 A.5。表 2 中的结果显示，MM-MT-Bench 与 LMSys-Vision ELO 评分的皮尔逊相关系数为 0.91。

items.en: Examples. MM-MT-Bench was designed to mimic real world usage of vision-language models, for extraction, summarization and reasoning over the contents of an image. Representative images from each category are provided in Figure 12 and an example of rated model responses from vision-language models are provided in Figure 11. We manually curated the images, prompts and answers and verified the answers from a second group of labelers. We ensure that all prompts require reference to the image input to be answered correctly.
items.zh: 示例。MM-MT-Bench 旨在模拟视觉语言模型在提取、总结和推理图像内容方面的真实世界使用。每个类别的代表性图像见图 12，视觉语言模型评分的模型响应示例见图 11。我们手动整理了图像、提示和答案，并由第二组标注员验证了答案。我们确保所有提示都需要参考图像输入才能正确回答。

items.capEn: Figure 4: MM-MT-Bench: We open-source a new instruction following benchmark for multimodal models, which correlates highly with LMSys ELO ratings. Given an input image, reference answer and model response, an independent LLM judge is instructed to grade the model’s response on a scale of 1 through 10.
items.capZh: 图 4：MM-MT-Bench：我们开源了一个新的多模态模型指令跟随基准测试，该基准测试与 LMSys ELO 评分高度相关。给定输入图像、参考答案和模型响应，独立的 LLM 评判员被指示以 1 到 10 的等级对模型的响应进行评分。

items.en: In this section, we provide evaluations of Pixtral 12B against closed and open-source models across a range of model sizes, re-evaluating all models through the same evaluation harness. Particularly, for each dataset, we design the prompt such that we can reproduce the results of leading multimodal models (GPT-4o [16] and Claude-3.5 Sonnet [1]). These prompts are ‘Explicit’ and fully specify the output format (see Section 4.2), allowing models which follow the prompt instructions to be marked accurately at test-time. All models were evaluated with the same prompts, which are specified in Appendix A. We provide additional analysis on re-evaluating models under various prompts and metrics in Sections 4.2 and 4.3, as well as in Appendices D and E.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们提供了 Pixtral 12B 与各种模型大小的闭源和开源模型的评估，通过相同的评估框架重新评估所有模型。特别地，对于每个数据集，我们设计提示，以便能够重现领先多模态模型（GPT-4o [16] 和 Claude-3.5 Sonnet [1]）的结果。这些提示是“显式”的，并完全指定了输出格式（见第 4.2 节），允许遵循提示指令的模型在测试时被准确评分。所有模型都使用相同的提示进行评估，这些提示在附录 A 中指定。我们在第 4.2 和 4.3 节以及附录 D 和 E 中提供了关于在不同提示和指标下重新评估模型的额外分析。

items.en: Multimodal performance: Table 2 shows that Pixtral substantially outperforms all open models around its scale on multimodal benchmarks, as well as closed source models such as Claude-3 Haiku [1] and Gemini-1.5 Flash 8B [18]. Particularly, Pixtral outperforms all models of comparable size on MM-MT-Bench, which targets real world use cases, a finding corroborated by strong performance on LMSys Vision Arena. On this public leaderboard, Pixtral 12B approaches the performance of the largest open-weights models, such as Qwen2-VL 72B [23] and Llama-3.2 90B [6].
items.zh: 多模态性能：表 2 显示，Pixtral 在多模态基准测试上显著优于所有与其规模相近的开放模型，以及闭源模型如 Claude-3 Haiku [1] 和 Gemini-1.5 Flash 8B [18]。特别地，Pixtral 在针对真实世界用例的 MM-MT-Bench 上优于所有可比大小的模型，这一发现得到了 LMSys Vision Arena 上强劲性能的证实。在这个公开排行榜上，Pixtral 12B 接近最大开放权重模型（如 Qwen2-VL 72B [23] 和 Llama-3.2 90B [6]）的性能。

items.en: We highlight that, with our ‘Explicit’ prompts, the performance of some open-source models is substantially lower than their reported figures. For the closest open-source models – Qwen2-VL 7B [23] and Llama-3.2 11B [6] – this is mainly due to models not following instructions on answer formatting (e.g. generating "The answer is 6." instead of "Final answer: 6"). For transparent comparison against these models, we further report their evaluations using relaxed metrics, with more flexible parsing, in gray (see Section 4.3). We analyze the performance of these models under various prompts in Appendix D. In Appendix E, we customize the evaluation to each model in turn, describing the changes required to bridge the gaps to reported performance.
items.zh: 我们强调，使用我们的“显式”提示，一些开源模型的性能显著低于其报告的数字。对于最接近的开源模型——Qwen2-VL 7B [23] 和 Llama-3.2 11B [6]——这主要是由于模型没有遵循答案格式的指令（例如，生成“答案是 6。”而不是“最终答案：6”）。为了与这些模型进行透明比较，我们进一步报告了它们使用宽松指标（更灵活的解析）的评估结果，以灰色显示（见第 4.3 节）。我们在附录 D 中分析了这些模型在不同提示下的性能。在附录 E 中，我们依次为每个模型定制评估，描述了弥合与报告性能差距所需的更改。

items.en: Language performance: Table 3 evaluates Pixtral 12B against open-source models of comparable size on common text-only benchmarks (again, with common prompting and evaluation protocols). Pixtral does not compromise text understanding in pursuit of multimodal capabilities, making it a suitable drop-in replacement for both text and vision tasks.
items.zh: 语言性能：表 3 评估了 Pixtral 12B 与类似大小的开源模型在常见纯文本基准测试上的表现（同样使用常见的提示和评估协议）。Pixtral 在追求多模态能力的同时没有牺牲文本理解，使其成为文本和视觉任务的合适即插即用替代品。

items.en: Here we discuss our methodology for designing the evaluation prompts. In our evaluation harness, we choose prompts which allow for reproduction of the reported results of leading closed-source models: GPT-4o [16] and Claude-3.5-Sonnet [1]. These prompts are provided in Appendix A, and we report results averaged over 10 prompts in Appendix D.
items.zh: 这里我们讨论评估提示设计的方法论。在我们的评估框架中，我们选择允许重现领先闭源模型（GPT-4o [16] 和 Claude-3.5-Sonnet [1]）报告结果的提示。这些提示在附录 A 中提供，我们在附录 D 中报告了 10 个提示的平均结果。

items.en: We find that commonly used prompts do not properly specify the output format. For instance, for a multiple choice question, we find open-source prompts include vague instructions like "Select the correct answer from the options above". In this case, it is impossible for models to know whether answers should be presented as an index ("Option A", "Option B" etc.) or with a natural language response. Models are then penalized for incorrect formatting. As such, leading models require prompts which explicitly specify the required output format. We illustrate this with a real example from MMMU in Figure 5.
items.zh: 我们发现常用的提示没有正确指定输出格式。例如，对于多项选择题，我们发现开源提示包含模糊的指令，如“从以上选项中选择正确答案”。在这种情况下，模型无法知道答案应以索引（“选项 A”、“选项 B”等）还是自然语言响应呈现。然后模型因格式不正确而受到惩罚。因此，领先模型需要明确指定所需输出格式的提示。我们在图 5 中用 MMMU 的真实示例说明了这一点。

items.en: In Table 4, we demonstrate that our ‘Explicit’ prompts substantially improve the performance of leading models over ‘Naive’ prompts. We also note that in a number of cases, the performance of smaller models reduces with the Explicit prompt format, perhaps due to a discrepancy with the prompt-style in the training set of these benchmarks. Pixtral 12B generally performs better with Explicit prompts, with only a minor regression on ChartQA.
items.zh: 在表 4 中，我们证明了我们的“显式”提示显著提高了领先模型相对于“朴素”提示的性能。我们还注意到，在许多情况下，较小模型的性能随着显式提示格式而降低，这可能是由于与这些基准测试训练集中的提示风格不一致。Pixtral 12B 通常在使用显式提示时表现更好，仅在 ChartQA 上有轻微下降。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Effect of ‘Naive’ vs. ‘Explicit’ prompts on leading models. Leading models benefit greatly from ‘Explicit’ prompts which provide details about the output format. This makes sense, as otherwise substantively correct responses are marked as incorrect during evaluation (top row, right).
items.capZh: 图 5：“朴素”提示与“显式”提示对领先模型的影响。领先模型从提供输出格式细节的“显式”提示中受益匪浅。这是有道理的，否则实质正确的响应在评估中会被标记为错误（顶行，右侧）。

items.en: In Section 4.2, we discuss the importance of prompts which properly specify the output format. However, during evaluations, we find that even with Explicit prompts, many models still provide outputs in various formats, which are then penalized by metrics which require responses to match the reference answers exactly.
items.zh: 在第 4.2 节中，我们讨论了正确指定输出格式的提示的重要性。然而，在评估过程中，我们发现即使使用显式提示，许多模型仍然以各种格式提供输出，然后被要求响应与参考答案完全匹配的指标所惩罚。

items.en: To investigate this, we take models’ generations and evaluate them under progressively looser parsing constraints. For instance, if the correct answer is "6", flexible metrics do not penalize answers such as "6.0" or "The answer is 6". We provide the details of these parsing settings in Appendix C, but here note that ‘Flexible Level 3’ marks a response as correct if the reference answer occurs anywhere in the generation. This is an overly generous metric which is included only to illustrate an upper bound, as it permits answers like "6000" for a reference answer of "6".
items.zh: 为了研究这一点，我们获取模型的生成结果，并在逐渐宽松的解析约束下进行评估。例如，如果正确答案是“6”，灵活的指标不会惩罚诸如“6.0”或“答案是6”之类的答案。我们在附录C中提供了这些解析设置的详细信息，但这里需要注意的是，“灵活级别3”将参考答案出现在生成内容中的任何位置都标记为正确。这是一个过于宽松的指标，仅用于说明上限，因为它允许针对参考答案“6”出现“6000”这样的答案。

items.en: We provide the results of our analysis in Table 5. We find that the performance of some models dramatically improves with more flexible parsing metrics, indicating that the lower scores can be attributed to the inability of models to properly follow prompt instructions. We further note that Pixtral 12B benefits very little from flexible parsing (substantiating its ability to follow instructions), and furthermore can generally outperform other models even after flexible metrics are used.
items.zh: 我们在表5中提供了分析结果。我们发现，一些模型的性能在更灵活的解析指标下显著提升，这表明较低的分数可归因于模型无法正确遵循提示指令。我们进一步注意到，Pixtral 12B从灵活解析中获益甚微（证实了其遵循指令的能力），而且即使在采用灵活指标后，它通常也能优于其他模型。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Vision encoder ablations: When leveraged for visual instruction tuning, our encoder substantially outperforms a strong CLIPA [10] baseline for tasks requiring fine-grained document understanding, while maintaining parity for natural images.
items.capZh: 图6：视觉编码器消融实验：当用于视觉指令微调时，我们的编码器在需要细粒度文档理解的任务上显著优于强大的CLIPA [10]基线，同时在自然图像上保持性能相当。

items.en: In order to verify the design choices for our vision encoder, we conduct small-scale ablations with Visual Instruction Tuning [13]. We conduct short-horizon multimodal instruction-tuning runs, both with our vision encoder (Pixtral-ViT), as well as a CLIPA [10] backbone as a baseline. For both vision encoders, we use Mistral-Nemo 12B-Instruct [15] to initialize the multimodal decoder.
items.zh: 为了验证我们视觉编码器的设计选择，我们使用视觉指令微调[13]进行了小规模消融实验。我们进行了短周期多模态指令微调运行，分别使用我们的视觉编码器（Pixtral-ViT）和CLIPA [10]主干作为基线。对于两个视觉编码器，我们使用Mistral-Nemo 12B-Instruct [15]初始化多模态解码器。

items.en: Like many open-source vision encoders, CLIPA is trained at a fixed resolution of 224×224224224224\times 224 pixels. In order to upscale the resolution in vision-language models, existing methods [12] construct several tiled crops from the image, and pass each crop independently through the vision encoder at its pretraining resolution. We conduct two ablations with CLIPA: (a) we resize the entire image to 224×224224224224\times 224; (b) we construct 252525 crops of the input image, for a total resolution of 1120×1120112011201120\times 1120. These models are also evaluated at 224224224 pixels and 112011201120 pixels respectively, while our flexible encoder is evaluated at variable image resolutions, with a maximum resolution of 102410241024 pixels.
items.zh: 与许多开源视觉编码器一样，CLIPA在固定的224×224像素分辨率下训练。为了在视觉语言模型中提升分辨率，现有方法[12]从图像中构建多个平铺裁剪，并将每个裁剪独立地通过其预训练分辨率的视觉编码器。我们对CLIPA进行了两项消融实验：(a) 将整个图像调整为224×224；(b) 从输入图像构建25个裁剪，总分辨率为1120×1120。这些模型也分别在224像素和1120像素下进行评估，而我们的灵活编码器在可变图像分辨率下进行评估，最大分辨率为1024像素。

items.en: In Figure 6, we find that our model substantially outperforms CLIPA in settings which require fine-grained understanding, such as chart and document understanding, while matching its performance on natural language benchmarks such as VQAv2.
items.zh: 在图6中，我们发现我们的模型在需要细粒度理解的场景（如图表和文档理解）中显著优于CLIPA，同时在自然语言基准（如VQAv2）上与其性能相当。

items.en: We discuss real world application of Pixtral by looking at some qualitative examples. Specifically, Pixtral can be used for reasoning over complex figures (eg. Fig. 7), multi-image instruction following (eg. Fig. 8), chart understanding and analysis (eg. Fig. 9) and converting image to code (eg. Fig. 10).
items.zh: 我们通过一些定性示例讨论Pixtral的实际应用。具体来说，Pixtral可用于复杂图形的推理（例如图7）、多图像指令遵循（例如图8）、图表理解与分析（例如图9）以及图像到代码的转换（例如图10）。

items.en: In Fig. 11, we compare Pixtral 12B to QwenVL-7B and Gemini-1.5 Flash-8B (0827) on an example from MM-MT-Bench. The example consists of a complex chart on job jitters in the US with an instruction requiring accurate understanding, reasoning and analysis of the chart. Pixtral’s response is complete and accurate, hence getting a rating of 8, while Gemini-Flash-8B extracts wrong information, and QwenVL does not elaborate on trends.
items.zh: 在图11中，我们将Pixtral 12B与QwenVL-7B和Gemini-1.5 Flash-8B（0827）在MM-MT-Bench的一个示例上进行比较。该示例包含一个关于美国工作焦虑的复杂图表，指令要求准确理解、推理和分析图表。Pixtral的回答完整且准确，因此获得8分，而Gemini-Flash-8B提取了错误信息，QwenVL未详细说明趋势。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Reasoning over complex figures. An example showcasing Pixtral’s capabilities to understand and reason over complex figures. Pixtral correctly identifies that the green boxes represent the European countries and then reads and sorts the GDP of all the European countries to list the top 5 with accurate GDP numbers.
items.capZh: 图7：复杂图形推理。一个示例展示了Pixtral理解和推理复杂图形的能力。Pixtral正确识别出绿色框代表欧洲国家，然后读取并排序所有欧洲国家的GDP，列出前五名并给出准确的GDP数字。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Multi-image instruction following. Pixtral can process arbitrary number of images in its context window. The example shows that Pixtral can successfully combine the information from both images into a single markdown table.
items.capZh: 图8：多图像指令遵循。Pixtral可以在其上下文窗口中处理任意数量的图像。该示例显示Pixtral能够成功地将两张图像中的信息合并到一个markdown表格中。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Chart Understanding and Analysis. Pixtral demonstrates the capability to interpret and analyze intricate charts with high accuracy. In this instance, Pixtral correctly identifies that "dark-dragon" corresponds to the red line. Furthermore, it recognizes that the training loss is expected to decrease smoothly and notes that the training run became unstable around the 10K step mark due to a significant spike in loss.
items.capZh: 图9：图表理解与分析。Pixtral展示了高精度解释和分析复杂图表的能力。在此实例中，Pixtral正确识别出“dark-dragon”对应红线。此外，它认识到训练损失预计会平滑下降，并注意到训练运行在大约10K步时因损失显著峰值而变得不稳定。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Image to Code. This demonstration illustrates Pixtral’s capability to convert hand-drawn website interfaces into executable HTML code, bringing hand-drawn designs to life as fully functional websites.
items.capZh: 图10：图像到代码。此演示说明了Pixtral将手绘网站界面转换为可执行HTML代码的能力，将手绘设计变为功能齐全的网站。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Examples of model responses from Pixral-12B, QwenVL-7B and Gemini-1.5 Flash-8B (0827) LLM-as-a-judge scores. Pixtral’s response is complete and accurate, hence getting a rating of 8, while Gemini-Flash-8B extracts wrong information, and QwenVL does not elaborate on trends.
items.capZh: 图11：来自Pixtral-12B、QwenVL-7B和Gemini-1.5 Flash-8B（0827）的模型响应示例及LLM作为评判者的评分。Pixtral的回答完整且准确，因此获得8分，而Gemini-Flash-8B提取了错误信息，QwenVL未详细说明趋势。

items.en: This paper introduced Pixtral 12B, a state-of-the-art multimodal model that excels in both text-only and multimodal tasks. With a novel architecture featuring a 400M-parameter vision encoder and a 12B-parameter multimodal decoder, Pixtral 12B demonstrates strong performance across various benchmarks, outperforming other open models and matching larger models. Its superior instruction following abilities, support for variable image sizes, and long context window make it highly versatile for complex multimodal applications. Pixtral 12B is released under the Apache 2.0 license.
items.zh: 本文介绍了Pixtral 12B，这是一种最先进的多模态模型，在纯文本和多模态任务中均表现出色。凭借新颖的架构，包括4亿参数的视觉编码器和120亿参数的多模态解码器，Pixtral 12B在各种基准测试中展现出强劲性能，优于其他开放模型并与更大模型匹敌。其卓越的指令遵循能力、对可变图像尺寸的支持以及长上下文窗口使其在复杂的多模态应用中具有高度通用性。Pixtral 12B根据Apache 2.0许可证发布。

items.en: Mistral AI Science team (listed in alphabetical order by last name):
items.zh: Mistral AI科学团队（按姓氏字母顺序排列）：

items.en: Pravesh Agrawal, Szymon Antoniak, Emma Bou Hanna, Baptiste Bout, Devendra Chaplot, Jessica Chudnovsky, Diogo Costa, Baudouin De Monicault, Saurabh Garg, Theophile Gervet, Soham Ghosh, Amélie Héliou, Paul Jacob, Albert Q. Jiang, Kartik Khandelwal, Timothée Lacroix, Guillaume Lample, Diego Las Casas, Thibaut Lavril, Teven Le Scao, Andy Lo, William Marshall, Louis Martin, Arthur Mensch, Pavankumar Muddireddy, Valera Nemychnikova, Marie Pellat, Patrick Von Platen, Nikhil Raghuraman, Baptiste Rozière, Alexandre Sablayrolles, Lucile Saulnier, Romain Sauvestre, Wendy Shang, Roman Soletskyi, Lawrence Stewart, Pierre Stock, Joachim Studnia, Sandeep Subramanian, Sagar Vaze, Thomas Wang, Sophia Yang.

Jiang, Kartik Khandelwal, Timothée Lacroix, Guillaume Lample, Diego Las Casas, Thibaut Lavril, Teven Le Scao, Andy Lo, William Marshall, Louis Martin, Arthur Mensch, Pavankumar Muddireddy, Valera Nemychnikova, Marie Pellat, Patrick Von Platen, Nikhil Raghuraman, Baptiste Rozière, Alexandre Sablayrolles, Lucile Saulnier, Romain Sauvestre, Wendy Shang, Roman Soletskyi, Lawrence Stewart, Pierre Stock, Joachim Studnia, Sandeep Subramanian, Sagar Vaze, Thomas Wang, Sophia Yang.

items.en: We extend our thanks to the LMSys team for their assistance in deploying our model in the LLM arena, and the vLLM team for their help in integrating Pixtral 12B into their inference library.
items.zh: 我们感谢LMSys团队在LLM竞技场部署我们模型方面的协助，以及vLLM团队在将Pixtral 12B集成到其推理库方面的帮助。
